prompt: Create a [YEAR] aesthetic illustrated calendar poster featuring the same mature [WOMAN/MAN/PERSON] (uploaded photo reference face 100%) across all 12 popular and tourist locations of [LOCATION] in different outfits and moods. The artwork should be in a soft watercolor + ink sketch style with clean hand-drawn linework and light textured shading. 🎨✨ The character has an expressive face.
promptEn: Create a [YEAR] aesthetic illustrated calendar poster featuring the same mature [WOMAN/MAN/PERSON] (uploaded photo reference face 100%) across all 12 popular and tourist locations of [LOCATION] in different outfits and moods. The artwork should be in a soft watercolor + ink sketch style with clean hand-drawn linework and light textured shading. 🎨✨ The character has an expressive face.
promptZh: 创作一张 [年份] 年美学插画日历海报，让同一位成熟的 [女性/男性/人物]（上传照片 100% 还原面部）出现在 [地点] 的 12 个热门旅游景点中，并搭配不同的服装与心情。艺术风格应为柔和的水彩 + 水墨素描，线条干净利落，并带有轻微的纹理阴影。🎨✨ 人物面部表情生动。
